heading: Preventing improper use of taxpayer funds

children.text: require that each recipient of a grant or subgrant under the Elementary and Secondary Education Act of 1965 ( et seq.) display, in a public place, the hotline contact information of the Office of Inspector General of the Department of Education so that any individual who observes, detects, or suspects improper use of taxpayer funds can easily report such improper use;20 U.S.C. 6301
annually notify employees of the Department of Education of their responsibility to report fraud; and

children.label: A
children.text: for a grant under such Act to provide an assurance to the Secretary that any information submitted when applying for such grant and responding to monitoring and compliance reviews is truthful and accurate; and

children.label: B
children.text: for a subgrant under such Act to provide the assurance described in subparagraph (A) to the entity awarding the subgrant.
